about.journeySubtitle: From a small studio in Nagaland to a full-scale creative agency: here’s how KAKI evolved, one bold move at a time.
about.teamSubtitle: The creative minds behind KAKI's success, each bringing unique expertise and passion to every project.
about.valuesSubtitle: The principles that guide everything we do and drive us to create exceptional work.
about.ctaSubtitle: Ready to be part of a team that's shaping the future of creative culture? Let's create something extraordinary together.

hero.title: About KAKI
hero.subtitle: We build brands through strategy, storytelling, and design that delivers real results.

intro.title: Who We Are
intro.description: We’re not just a creative agency. We’re builders, brand architects, problem solvers — born in Nagaland, built to take bold ideas to the world. Founded in 2021, KAKI started as a lean crew with a big vision: to give Nagaland and Northeast India the digital firepower it deserves. Today, we’re a growing team of designers, strategists, developers, storytellers, and creators delivering full-stack marketing solutions across India and beyond.
intro.subDescription: Whether you’re a startup, social movement, football league, or festival, we’re here to help you show up, stand out, and scale up.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: At KAKI, we believe in the power of creativity to shape culture and drive meaningful change. Our mission is to craft exceptional experiences that resonate with audiences and leave lasting impressions.
mission.subDescription: Through our four specialized departments, we offer comprehensive creative solutions that span from initial concept to final execution, ensuring every project reflects our commitment to excellence and innovation.

timeline.title: The Beginning
timeline.description: KAKI was born from a tiny studio with a mission: craft stories that connect, brands that matter, and culture that moves.

timeline.title: Foundations Built
timeline.description: We expanded into digital marketing, launched KAKI Studio for video production, and delivered campaigns that turned local brands into buzzworthy names.

timeline.title: Momentum Mode
timeline.description: KAKI scaled up. From managing state-wide campaigns to producing high-profile events with 5,000+ attendees, we proved ideas backed by execution create real impact.

timeline.title: Creative Force
timeline.description: With four powerhouse divisions — Strategy, Studio, Design, Tech and Events — we became the go-to agency for brands looking to blend storytelling with scale.

timeline.title: Culture x Creativity x Growth
timeline.description: We’re just getting started. From Nagaland to the world, KAKI continues to build brands that dare, disrupt, and deliver.

values.title: Excellence
values.description: We don’t settle for “good enough.” Every campaign, design, and frame is crafted with sharp detail and a drive to exceed expectations, because results matter.

values.title: Innovation
values.description: We move fast and think forward. From emerging tech to creative-first strategies, we stay ahead of trends to help our clients lead — not follow.

values.title: Collaboration
values.description: Great ideas don’t happen in silos. We build strong, transparent partnerships with our clients, working as one team to bring bold visions to life.

values.title: Culture
values.description: We create more than content. We build cultural relevance. Our work is rooted in Nagaland identity and designed to spark meaningful conversations, online and offline.

hero.title: Our Team
hero.subtitle: A dynamic group of creatives, marketers, strategists, and technologists working together to build bold brands and deliver real results.

hiring.title: Join Our Tech Family
hiring.description: We're always on the lookout for passionate, talented individuals to join our growing team. Think you have what it takes to help us build the future?

values.title: Innovation First
values.description: We embrace cutting-edge technologies and aren't afraid to push boundaries to achieve extraordinary results.

values.title: Collaborative Spirit
values.description: We believe great ideas can come from anywhere, and our best work happens when diverse minds unite.

values.title: Quality Excellence
values.description: Everything we create is built with precision, scalability, and user experience in mind.
